function.message: I can’t directly create a real calendar invite from this sandbox. There is no local calendar workflow in the repo and no tool to call external calendar services (Google Calendar/Outlook).
function.rulebook_notes: Applied unsupported-capability discipline: do not create workaround artifacts for actions that require external integrations.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence: searched repository for scheduling mechanisms ('calendar invite' and 'calendar') and found zero matches; available tools are local file operations only (read/write/search/etc.) with no external API capability to send/create real calendar events.
